# Juke (JukeCoding)

> Juke (JukeCoding) is an AI and software studio in Hasselt, Belgium. Juke builds AI solutions, SaaS platforms and websites for ambitious companies, and is developing Beheerly, a new product for property managers (syndici) and co-ownerships (VMEs) in Belgium.

- Brand: Juke, also written JukeCoding / Juke Coding
- Location: Hasselt, Limburg, Belgium
- Contact: contact@jukecoding.be · +32 479 13 17 15
- Languages: Dutch (nl-BE), English (en)

## Products

- [Beheerly](https://jukecoding.be/beheerly): New Juke product, in development (2026), that simplifies the administration of property managers and co-ownerships (VMEs) in Belgium. Early access by mail.

## Pages

- [Home](https://jukecoding.be/): AI & SaaS development studio in Hasselt.
- [AI-projecten](https://jukecoding.be/ai-projecten): Custom AI solutions and automation for businesses.
- [SaaS Development](https://jukecoding.be/saas-development): SaaS platforms built from scratch.
- [Vibemind](https://jukecoding.be/vibemind): Juke product page.
- [Beheerly](https://jukecoding.be/beheerly): Upcoming product for syndici / property managers.
- [Contact](https://jukecoding.be/contact): Get in touch with Juke.

- [Hoeveel kost een website op maat in België?](https://jukecoding.be/blog/hoeveel-kost-een-website-op-maat-belgie)

- [Waarom is een website belangrijk in je onderneming?](https://jukecoding.be/blog/waarom-is-een-website-belangrijk-in-je-onderneming-7-redenen-die-je-niet-mag-negeren)
